user.title: Grocery List Setup
user.description: Choose how this Home Assistant instance stores its grocery lists.

local.title: Local Grocery List
local.description: Give this Home Assistant instance a name. Your lists are stored locally and are not synced to any git repository.

data_description.identity: This name is stored with every item you add (the 'added by' field) and scopes your undo/redo history.

git.title: Grocery List Setup
git.description: Give this Home Assistant instance a name and connect it to your git repository. The repository will be cloned to validate the connection; setup only completes if the clone succeeds.

data_description.identity: This name is stored with every item you add (the 'added by' field) and scopes your undo/redo history.
data_description.auth_method: Choose SSH (recommended: a repo-scoped deploy key) or HTTPS (a repo-scoped access token).
data_description.repo_url: For SSH use git@host:owner/repo.git. For HTTPS use https://host/owner/repo.git.
data_description.lists_path: Relative folder inside the repository where list files are stored, e.g. path/to/grocery-lists. Leave empty to store them at the repository root.
data_description.ssh_key: Paste the private key, or leave empty and provide a file path below.
data_description.ssh_key_path: Path to a mounted private key file (permissions 600). Preferred so the key is not stored in Home Assistant.
data_description.https_token: Repo-scoped fine-grained token. Leave empty for public repositories.

error.clone_failed: Could not clone the repository. Check the URL and credentials.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your SSH key or access token.
error.invalid_url: The repository URL is not valid for the selected authentication method.
error.key_read_failed: Could not read the SSH key file at the given path.

init.title: Grocery List Options

data.ssh_key_path: New SSH private key file path

data_description.auth_method: Switch between SSH and HTTPS. If you change this, provide the matching credential below (or ensure it was set previously).
data_description.ssh_key: Paste a new private key to replace the stored one. Leave empty to keep the current key.
data_description.ssh_key_path: Path to a mounted private key file (permissions 600). Leave empty to keep the current path.
data_description.https_token: Repo-scoped fine-grained token. Leave empty to keep the current token.

error.clone_failed: Could not clone the repository. Check the URL and credentials.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your SSH key or access token.
error.invalid_url: The repository URL is not valid for the selected authentication method.
